name: Propolis
lead: A bee-collected resin with mild antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activity. Useful as a supportive ingredient in acne-prone or sensitive routines — but the contact-allergy rate is meaningfully higher than for most cosmetic actives. Patch test before commitment.

whatItIs.body: ropolis is a sticky resin honeybees produce by collecting plant exudates and mixing them with their own enzymes. The bees use it as a hive sealant and antimicrobial coating. The cosmetic-relevant fraction includes flavonoids (galangin, pinocembrin, chrysin), phenolic acids (caffeic, ferulic), and terpenoids — most of which have measurable antioxidant and antimicrobial activity in vitro.
whatItIs.body2: The composition varies meaningfully by region and bee species, which is why brand-to-brand consistency is harder to evaluate than for synthetic ingredients. Korean and Brazilian propolis are the two most-studied sources in modern cosmetic literature.

mechanism.b: Active against C. acnes, S. aureus, and several skin yeasts in vitro. Cosmetic translation is supportive, not therapeutic.
Flavonoid fraction scavenges ROS; modest topical effect compared to vitamin C.
Reduces NF-κB and COX-2 signalling; useful for mild redness and post-acne calm.

evidence.note: Useful adjunct in mild comedonal/inflammatory acne; not first-line.
Long pharmacy use in superficial wounds and burns; cosmetic translation modest.
Real and replicable on barrier-compromised skin (after passing patch test).

concentration.b: Therapeutic fraction for acne and sensitive skin.

pairings.note: Standard K-beauty soothing combo for sensitive skin.
PM retinoid, AM propolis. Useful for retinoid onboarding.
Apply acid, normalise pH, then propolis essence as calming layer.
Cross-reactivity is real. Always patch test; avoid entirely if severe bee allergy.

products.name: Glow Serum (Propolis + Niacinamide)
products.note: Reference Korean propolis serum. 60% propolis, niacinamide bonus, fair price.

products.name: Full Fit Propolis Light Ampoule
products.note: 73% propolis. Honest dose, sticky-honey vehicle some love.

products.name: Honey Mask
products.note: Honey + propolis wash-off mask. Weekly soothing layer rather than daily-use.

faq.a: It is supportive, not curative. For mild congestion and post-acne calm, useful. For moderate-to-severe acne, you need adapalene, BPO, or a dermatologist.

faq.q: How worried should I be about contact allergy?
faq.a: More than you would be for most cosmetic actives. The allergen rate in propolis is meaningfully higher than for niacinamide or HA. Patch test on your forearm for 48 hours before face application.
No — it is harvested from beehives. Cruelty-free claims depend on harvesting methods and sustainability of the apiary.
Brazilian green propolis has the highest published antioxidant content; Korean propolis dominates the K-beauty essence market. Both work; consistency is what matters.
